title: AEP v1.1 F18 Source Provenance Graph Row
description: v1.1 F18 frontier-break primitive (SPECULATIVE FRONTIER). Three-agent convergence (scout+scout+warden+curator). Every source row carries lineage_depth + venue_tier + peer_review_status + invalidator_checked + adjacency_invalidator_ids[]. Promotion-time freeze-lock via Ed25519. Validator computes laundering-score on read; promotion gates condition on score <= threshold. Composes_with: sec04 security, sec50 EH Law-3 anti-source-laundering, sec73.3 prior-art-inheritance, v0.8 F2 reproducibility_certificate (source_hashes_at_reproduce).

bound_to_source_id.description: Source ID this row annotates. Must resolve to an entry in data/sources.jsonl.

lineage_depth.description: Distance from operator-verbatim origin. 0 = operator verbatim. 1 = external (e.g., arxiv, OpenAI). 2 = peer-reviewed analysis citing external. 3+ = the agent-synthesis or deeper. Anti-source-laundering audit gates on this.

venue_tier.description: Source venue category. operator_verbatim is the canonical anchor; unknown emits AEP11_F18_VENUE_UNKNOWN warning.

peer_review_status.description: Peer-review status. external_validator_signed composes with v0.8 F3 external_validator_signatures[].

invalidator_checked.description: Whether scout has checked the source against known invalidators (retractions, errata, contradicting peer-reviewed sources).

adjacency_invalidator_ids.description: Source IDs of adjacent invalidators (retractions, contradicting sources) that scout has checked against.

citation_count_at_absorption.description: External citation count at the time scout absorbed this source. null if not applicable.

freeze_lock_ed25519_signature.description: Ed25519 signature freezing this source's bytes at LANDED time. Base64url-encoded. null until packet promotes to PROVEN/RELIABLE. Composes with v0.8 F3.

laundering_score_computed.description: Validator-computed laundering score. Graph-walk distance / fan-out / source-self-citation density. Higher = more laundered. Default null = unmeasured.

laundering_score_threshold.description: Threshold above which the source is laundering-risky. Default 0.6.

source_url_at_absorption.description: URL of the source at absorption time. Composes with future Memento-RFC-7089 perma-binding.

source_sha256.description: Source byte sha256 at absorption time. Anchors freeze-lock.
